scripts.start: MONGO_URL="mongodb://127.0.0.1:27017/timehuddle?replicaSet=rs0" MONGO_OPLOG_URL="mongodb://127.0.0.1:27017/local?replicaSet=rs0" METEOR_AGENDA_ENABLED="${METEOR_AGENDA_ENABLED:-true}" SMTP_HOST="${SMTP_HOST:-localhost}" SMTP_PORT="${SMTP_PORT:-1025}" SMTP_SECURE="${SMTP_SECURE:-false}" EMAIL_FROM="${EMAIL_FROM:-TimeHuddle <noreply@timehuddle.local>}" APP_URL="${APP_URL:-http://localhost:3000}" METEOR_PACKAGE_DIRS=../vendor/meteor-wormhole/packages meteor run --port 3100
